| D1  | G4 schema refactor — per-type allOf with unevaluatedProperties | S2 | schema | Move per-type extension fields from `file_record` top-level `properties` into `allOf/then` blocks so cross-type field pollution is rejected (a memory record currently accepts `runner_os` without error). Proper fix requires bumping schema to draft-2019-09 and switching the harness to `Ajv2019` — `unevaluatedProperties: false` is unavailable in draft-07. Current schema passes all 8 validation tests; concern is theoretical. Target: schema v1.1 bump OR Piece 3 Step S2 validator-library work, whichever lands first. Origin: PR #7 R1 Gemini G4. | 2026-04-19 |
| D2  | applyArbitration audit trail (label catalog mutations) | S2 | pr-review | `preview.applyArbitration` performs bulk on-disk catalog mutations with no per-run audit log. Operator + decision-set + outcome (applied / skipped / errors / modified paths) is reconstructable only from `git log` on the catalog JSONL files, which is painful for forensic work. Proposed shape: write `arbitration-audit.jsonl` next to the catalogs with `{ts, operator, decisions_applied, decisions_skipped, errors, modified_paths, package_hash}`. Defer until a real audit/observability subsystem is on the roadmap (avoid adding a one-off audit format that diverges from whatever subsystem we eventually settle on). Risk if not addressed: any pre-subsystem arbitration gone wrong has no forensic trail beyond `git log`. Origin: PR #11 R1 Qodo compliance "Missing audit trail". | 2026-04-23 |
